# DIY Poke Card Maker

> AI-powered trading card creator at https://www.diypokecard.com

## What it does
- Creates custom trading cards using AI image generation
- Upload a photo → get an anime-style portrait on a real card template
- Or pick a color, animal, and superpower → AI generates a unique creature
- First card is free, affordable packs available

## Features
- AI photo-to-anime transformation (no manual editing needed)
- 3 card styles: Supporter, Full Art, Pokemon EX
- Instant generation in 15-20 seconds
- Email delivery of generated cards
- Works on mobile and desktop

## How it's different from competitors
- AI-powered (vs manual template editors like pokecardmaker.net and pokecardgenerator.com)
- Photo upload with anime stylization — no design skills needed
- Original AI-generated artwork, not copyrighted materials
- Affordable micro-transactions (first card free, then $0.99+ packs)
